targets.query: SELECT moving_average(mean("value"), 6) FROM "HeartRate_Intraday" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT moving_average(mean("value"), 6) FROM "HeartRate_Intraday" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
select mean_value from (SELECT mean("HeartRate") as mean_value FROM "HeartRateIntraday" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1m) fill(null)) where mean_value < 56

SELECT mean_value FROM (
    SELECT mean("HeartRate") as mean_value
    FROM "HeartRateIntraday"
    WHERE $timeFilter
    GROUP BY time(1m) fill(null)
  ) WHERE mean_value >= 56 AND mean_value < 90

SELECT mean_value FROM (
    SELECT mean("HeartRate") as mean_value
    FROM "HeartRateIntraday"
    WHERE $timeFilter
    GROUP BY time(1m) fill(null)
  ) WHERE mean_value >= 90 AND mean_value < 130

SELECT mean_value FROM (
    SELECT mean("HeartRate") as mean_value
    FROM "HeartRateIntraday"
    WHERE $timeFilter
    GROUP BY time(1m) fill(null)
  ) WHERE mean_value >= 130 AND mean_value < 150
select mean_value from (SELECT mean("HeartRate") as mean_value FROM "HeartRateIntraday" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1m) fill(null)) where mean_value > 150
